title: Meridian
description: Redesigning wealth management for the next generation of investors.
longDescription: Meridian needed a complete reimagining of their wealth management platform. We conducted extensive user research with both advisors and retail investors, designed a new information architecture, and delivered a modern interface that simplifies complex financial data into actionable insights.

title: Canopy
description: Connecting care teams with patients through intelligent communication.
longDescription: Canopy's care coordination platform was powerful but hard to use. We redesigned the entire patient-facing experience — from appointment scheduling to real-time messaging — while introducing AI-powered triage that routes patients to the right care team instantly.

title: Arcline
description: Transforming raw data into actionable insights with clarity and speed.
longDescription: Arcline's analytics platform had all the data but none of the clarity. We redesigned their dashboard experience from the ground up, introducing customizable views, natural language queries, and a design system that scales across their growing product suite.

title: Volta
description: A premium direct-to-consumer storefront built for conversion.
longDescription: Volta wanted a storefront that felt as premium as their products. We designed an editorial-meets-commerce experience that blends rich storytelling with seamless purchasing — resulting in a 40% increase in conversion rate within three months of launch.
